race.comment: Competitive. LET'S BE HONEST (9) went close over 1250m at Newcastle first-up and then had excuses over 1500m there following and forgive. Went close three times at the provincials this distance range before the spell and that form would see him hard to beat in this company. TIME FOR SNOW (8) can improve again off a nose defeat over 1400m at Gundagai. Finally has a low gate and gets his chance. HOLD THE DOOR (2) won a Rosehill trial and then resumed there and didn't get warm. Showed enough her brief initial preparation to consider with the run under the belt. In a top barn and has the tongue tie on for the first time. GET LITT (5) rates well off her nose defeat at Newcastle but has to manage the outside gate today. Fitter but she's going to need luck.
